title: Infdefaultinstall.exe
html:
Infdefaultinstall.exe

Binary used to perform installation based on content inside inf files

Execute

Code execution

InfDefaultInstall.exe {PATH:.inf}

Executes SCT script using scrobj.dll from a command in entered into a specially prepared INF file. — MITRE: T1218 — Privileges: Admin
